case_title: DORA OSTREM VS. ALFREDO RENE POWELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-10-2018 CONTINUED TO NOV-21-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFFS RESPONSE TO OSC RE DISMISSAL FOR FAILURE TO SERVE (TRANSACTION ID # 100057321) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSTREM, DORA AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, ALFREDO RENE
UNINSURED MOTORIST ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-06-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNINSURED MOTORIST, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSTREM, DORA AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, ALFREDO RENE DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-10-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-09-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-17-2018
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100077552)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-08-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-21-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE UNINSURED MOTORIST SET FOR AUG-06-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM. JAN-08-2019 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. ***NOTE: IN THE FUTURE, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 3.0(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
